title: tagetes subulata
intro: Tagetes subulata, also known as the Lemongrass Marigold, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States, characterized by its delicate, grass-like foliage and bright yellow flowers. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, colds, and flu due to its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tagetes subulata include reducing fever, relieving digestive discomfort, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. Tagetes subulata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
